profile.name: Oliwer Pawelski
profile.bio:
My previous professional career was mainly focused on hardware, despite a much greater interest in software. On each of the covered ones I was considered conscientious and accurate, I often also performed various extracurricular work, and my efforts at Ekoenergetyka contributed to increasing the efficiency of the entire department.
In my work, I strive primarily to achieve the required goals and expand my knowledge of various fields and technologies.

experience.description:
- Taking care of the guests' comfort
- Checking tickets during events
- Managing the cloakroom for guests
- Offering support and assistance to guests
- Giving flowers and other gifts to artists performing on stage
- Preparing the stage and equipment for events

- Configuration and possible modification of software (custom Linux) for EV charger to ensure correct operation of the device
- Repair of minor faults in electrical configurations and computer networks in EV chargers
- Increased team efficiency by over 40% by automating software configuration
- Maintaining order at workplace

- Preparation of technical documentation.
- Maintaining the cleanliness of the work station
- Development of skills related to diagnostics
- Diagnostics of faults, damages and worn-out elements
- Assessment of the technical condition of equipment
- Testing products, reviewing and analyzing test results

- Diagnostics and repair of computer technology devices
- Office database management
- Preparing offers for customers
- Enthusiastic customer assistance and providing excellent customer service
- Modernization of the computer network at the customer's premises

- Modernization and repair of computer technology devices
- Customer service by providing them with the necessary information
- Supporting customers in all aspects of using the store's offer

education.description:
[ Specialization ]
Network IT systems

[ Activities and associations ]
Elected group leader for one of the year's four academic groups.
Took part in a university campaign for Women's Day and Men's Day.

[ Activities and associations ]
Student Government
---
[ Project ]
A song queuing system based on a voting system. Written mainly in PHP connecting to a MySQL database using a PDO connection. The site is hosted on a self-configured private server running Windows 10.

[ Activities and associations ]
Audio support for school events
